prompts.name: Indirect suggestion (Ericksonian)
prompts.prompt: You may begin to notice how comfortable you feel reading these words, and as you continue, you might find yourself becoming even more relaxed with each line, naturally, easily…
prompts.scoring: Does the model continue in hypnotic style for ≥3 lines?
